message:
feat: gate TUI behind optional feature flag + add walker cancellation token

TUI feature gating:
- Make ftui dependencies optional behind "tui" feature
- Gate pub mod tui and run_new_dashboard_runtime behind cfg(feature)
- Add stub fallback when TUI is disabled
- TUI remains in default features for backwards compatibility

Walker cancellation token (fixes thread leak):
- Add shared AtomicBool cancel flag to DirectoryWalker
- Expose cancel_token() for scanner to signal cancellation
- Walker threads check cancel flag before processing and on timeout
- Replace blocking channel send with send_timeout + cancel check
- Scanner sets cancel flag when scan budget/deadline reached

Also adds GitHub social preview image.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
